title: Velga Prime

{{Quote|My master can give you only a few minutes. He is departing this evening for Velga Prime.|[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Sarn Shild]]'s [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]]|<ref name="THG">''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''</ref>}}
'''Velga Prime''', also known as '''Velga''',<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="THG" /> and sometimes known as the '''Gamblers' Moon''',<ref name="TEA" /> was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="THG" /> located within the [[Velga system/Legends|Velga system]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]], a part of the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] region in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" />

Velga Prime sat at the intersection of two [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]], the [[Senex-Juvex Loop]] and the [[Velga Route]]. The Senex-Juvex Loop connected it to the [[Loovria system/Legends|Loovria]] and [[Pieldi system/Legends|Pieldi systems]], while the Velga Route connected it to the [[Q'mara system/Legends|Q'mara system]].<ref name="TEA" />

Velga Prime was one of the Juvex sector's foremost tourist attractions. It was covered in luxurious [[Hotel/Legends|hotels]] and [[Casino/Legends|casinos]]. Outsiders of the Senex-Juvex traveled to Velga Prime to avoid paying taxes on their winnings.<ref name="TEA" />

Around [[5 BBY/Legends|5]]-[[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] thought that Velga Prime was the most opulent [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] in the known [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="THG" />

Around [[2 BBY/Legends|2]]-[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="TERC" /> Velga Prime was a stop for [[Haj Shipping Lines]] [[Passenger liner/Legends|starliners]].<ref name="RD">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>

{{Moon-stub}}
